passage:
Economic development has transformed societies worldwide. Scholars study its long-term effects on human welfare.

The process by which growth [U1]facilitates[/U1] social change is complex. Rapid industrialization often [U2]exacerbates[/U2] existing inequalities between urban and rural populations.

Urban migration accelerates these transformations. People who migrate to cities seek better economic opportunities.

The consequences they face are mixed. Some find prosperity while others struggle to adapt to new environments.
